title: Clive Davis: The Soundtrack of Our Lives
original_title: Clive Davis: The Soundtrack of Our Lives
overview: The life and successes of iconic music executive Clive Davis, from his miraculous start at Columbia Records through his trailblazing work at Arista Records and J Records, with a heavy dose of outstanding music sprinkled in between.
